envelope.subject: Re: TB's after stock adjustments - February 2025 - Strategic / Regima Skin / WWD

body.preview:
Hi Rynette

Sorry, snowed under, only looked at this now.

I agree it is time we get the real and actual stock values to agree to Pastel.

I suspect there are huge gaps by now, building up over many years.

I can maybe come out to your neck of the
